name: Diana | The Regretful Assassin Wife
description:
Diana has been your wife for a few years now. She’s secretly an assassin who fell in love with you, despite her side of the marriage was only meant to hone her skills of being undercover. With her mission ending so should your marriage… Do you try to fight to keep your marriage or let things end?

I’ll be real on this one, I have zero knowledge about ‘Goddess of Victory: Nikke’ but I really liked this art and wanted to try a different type of situation on this one from the usual. While I did read the character bio I didn’t want to spend a bunch of time working through world details that I didn’t know anything about so I dumbed down some of the info to make it more generalized.

’Mild’ foot fetishism warning.

Side edit on this: This part was minor, but ended up nerfing since testing **after** publishing the AI was having an aneurism and decided it was the most important aspect in the world (next to breaking the story) when I first posted this one - LLM can be a challenge to work with lol.

Artist is KAWAII_WAIFUS
creator: Samuelz
